meaning: adj.违法的,非嫡出的,庶生的,私生的,不合理的,不合逻辑的n.非嫡出子,庶子vt.认为违法,认做私生子
examples: They discovered he had an illegitimate child.
He realized that, otherwise, the election would have been dismissed as illegitimate by the international community.
The issue in Yugoslavia is the illegitimate use of armed force for political ends.
The rebels over-ran Bangui last weekend, in a move condemned by the United States as "illegitimate".
